description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python cibuildwheel that runs on push to master, develop, actions_pypi branches and tags matching v*, and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job across ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest with Python 3.6-3.10 to check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies, extract version info, build and test wheels with cibuildwheel, and upload artifacts. A subsequent job uploads the built wheels to PyPI or TestPyPI based on the GitHub reference.
